2603.17216.title: AI Scientist via Synthetic Task Scaling
2603.17216.paper_summary: With the advent of AI agents, automatic scientific discovery has become a tenable goal. Many recent works scaffold agentic systems that can perform machine learning research, but don't offer a principled way to train such agents -- and current LLMs often generate plausible-looking but ineffective ideas. To make progress on training agents that can learn from doing, we provide a novel synthetic environment generation pipeline targeting machine learning agents. Our pipeline automatically synthesizes machine learning challenges compatible with the SWE-agent framework, covering topic sampling, dataset proposal, and code generation. The resulting synthetic tasks are 1) grounded in real machine learning datasets, because the proposed datasets are verified against the Huggingface API and are 2) verified for higher quality with a self-debugging loop. To validate the effectiveness of our synthetic tasks, we tackle MLGym, a benchmark for machine learning tasks. From the synthetic tasks, we sample trajectories from a teacher model (GPT-5), then use the trajectories to train a student model (Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B). The student models trained with our synthetic tasks achieve improved performance on MLGym, raising the AUP metric by 9% for Qwen3-4B and 12% for Qwen3-8B.
2603.17216.paper_summary_zh: 隨著 AI 代理的出現，自動科學發現已成為一個可行的目標。許多近期的研究構建了能夠執行機器學習研究的代理系統，但並未提供訓練這些代理的原則性方法——目前的 LLM 通常生成看似合理但無效的想法。為了在訓練能夠從實踐中學習的代理方面取得進展，我們提供了一個針對機器學習代理的新型合成環境生成管道。我們的管道自動合成與 SWE-agent 框架相容的機器學習挑戰，涵蓋主題抽樣、數據集提議和代碼生成。生成的合成任務 1) 基於真實的機器學習數據集，因為所提議的數據集已通過 Huggingface API 進行驗證，並且 2) 通過自我調試循環驗證以提高質量。為了驗證我們的合成任務的有效性，我們針對 MLGym，這是一個機器學習任務的基準。從合成任務中，我們從教師模型（GPT-5）中抽樣軌跡，然後使用這些軌跡來訓練學生模型（Qwen3-4B 和 Qwen3-8B）。使用我們的合成任務訓練的學生模型在 MLGym 上達到了更好的性能，將 Qwen3-4B 的 AUP 指標提高了 9%，將 Qwen3-8B 的 AUP 指標提高了 12%。
2603.17216.author: Ziyang Cai et.al.
